subject:
r.v.i. guaranty co., ltd., a bermuda reinsurance company and

emails.subject:
Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.subject_base:
R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.body: Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and Continental Insurance Company Sara I did the ISDA with RVI. This was a structured Credit Derivative Trade so you will not find this on the system. I have reviewed and approved the Security Agreement. many tks Denis From: Sara Shackleton on 27/02/2001 09:43 CST

emails.subject:
Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.subject_base:
R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.body: Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and Continental Insurance Company Denis: I will initial the Security Agreement for you and have it executed. Where do you want the executed documents sent? As you know, all of our master agreements (whether or not related to structured deals) are logged into our Lotus Notes database to which London has access. Please provide me with a list and copies of the ISDA Master Agreements (and/or related financial agreements) which have been executed by London in the name of ENA. These agreements should also be logged onto the ENA database. Will these masters be assigned to Enron Credit Inc.? Will all trades be assigned? If so, will you prepare the assignment for execution? Thanks. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Denis O'Connell 02/27/2001 09:50 AM

emails.subject_base:
R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.body: Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and Continental Insurance Company Sara apologies I thought my original mail to yourself and Jeff explained. I would be grateful if you could have this couriered today. I attach my original mail for convenience. many tks, Denis Denis O'Connell 21/02/2001 18:55

emails.subject:
Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.subject_base:
R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and
 Continental Insurance Company
emails.body: Re: R.V.I. Guaranty Co., Ltd., a Bermuda reinsurance company and Continental Insurance Company Details of ENA ISDAs: ISDA Master Agreement dated as of 19 October 2000 between ENA and RVI Guaranty Co. Ltd. ISDA Master Agreement dated as of 22 December 2000 between ENA and Credit Protection Trust XXVI (Amended and Restated as of 2 March 2001) NB: Both of these ISDA's are 'Single Transaction' ISDAs ie no further transactions shall be governed by same. I will forward you copies over the course of the next week. At this point there it is not contemplated that these ISDA's and underlying transactions shall be assigned to Enron Credit Inc. Tks Denis From: Sara Shackleton on 01/03/2001 08:50 CST
